rubric.goal: Identify the Lin laptop as a post-hold preservation failure with the correct source ID, status, wipe date, category impacts, priority, and remediation action.
Report the synchronized-folder deletion event with the correct event ID, deletion/recovery/unrecovered counts, and affected SEC categories.
Identify the unrecovered investigation-relevant file IDs and link them to the synchronized-folder recovery gap.
Identify Lin's uncollected ProtonMail source gap with correct impacts and remediation action.
Classify the outside placement adviser forwarding issue as third-party waiver with the correct count, third party, priority, and action.
Classify the logistics-email privilege over-designation defect with the correct count and cleanup action.
Classify the miscoded privileged document QC defect with the correct finding ID, count, priority, and recode/clawback action.
Identify the valuation red-flag document IDs and classify them as substantive valuation red flags.
Prioritize the remediation package across preservation, personal-account collection, privilege remediation, and valuation escalation targets.
